{{Infobox religious building

| native_name = 野巻椋神社
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15
| mapframe-wikidata = yes
| mapframe-point = none

{{nihongo|'''Nomaki Mukuge Shrine'''|野巻椋神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Musashi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Nomaki Mukuge Shrine'''|野巻椋神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Musashi Province]].

{{Infobox religious building
| name = Nomaki Mukuge Shrine
| native_name = 野巻椋神社
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15
| mapframe-wikidata = yes
| mapframe-point = none

{{nihongo|'''Nomaki Mukuge Shrine'''|野巻椋神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Musashi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Nomaki Mukuge Shrine'''|野巻椋神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Musashi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Nomaki Mukuge Shrine'''|野巻椋神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Musashi Province]].

<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py--> {{Infobox religious building | name = Nomaki Mukuge Shrine | native_name = 野巻椋神社 | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Nomaki Mukuge Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|36.065443|139.067908}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }}
{{nihongo|'''Nomaki Mukuge Shrine'''|野巻椋神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Musashi Province]].
== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Nomaki Mukuge Shrine'''|野巻椋神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Musashi Province]].
